description_long: This object consists of two classic fedora hats, one in dark gray and the other in brown, each featuring a medium-width brim and a pinched crown. Both hats are adorned with a grosgrain ribbon band encircling the base of the crown, with a subtle bow detail on the side. The brims are slightly curved downward, providing a stylish yet practical silhouette. The crowns are creased at the top, forming a teardrop shape that is characteristic of the fedora style. The surface of the hats appears to be made of felt, giving them a soft, matte finish. These hats are typically worn as fashionable accessories in urban environments, offering both sun protection and a touch of sophistication.
description: A pair of classic fedora hats, one dark gray and one brown, each with a pinched crown, medium brim, and ribbon band with a bow.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the teardrop-shaped pinched crowns and the full circular brims of both hats.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the ribbon bands and bow details, with the hats stacked vertically for clear comparison.
description_view_2: Angled view from the side, emphasizing the downward curve of the brims and the depth of the crown creases.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the ribbon bands and the smooth, continuous curve of the brims.
